name: Protein Powder (e.g. Whey)
summary: Not magic — a convenient, high-quality protein source. Valuable only insofar as it helps you reach your daily protein target; matched for total protein, powder and whole food are equivalent for muscle.
effect: Supports resistance-training gains by making it easy to hit total daily protein; no benefit beyond meeting protein needs. Whey is fast-digesting and leucine-rich.
dosing: As needed to reach ~1.6 g/kg/day total protein; a typical scoop is ~20-30 g. Whole-food protein works equally well.
timing: Any time that helps you hit daily protein; peri-workout timing is a minor factor.
safety: Safe for those without dairy allergy/intolerance; lactose-free and plant blends exist for others.
